name: I'm in an air Duct
hints: Air duct with a gem and a large fan blocking passage. Dangerous!
GET GEM. The fan must be stopped from elsewhere (thermostat in penthouse). AT BUTTON is FATAL.
GET GEM (treasure). LOOK FAN shows RPM. AT BUTTON kills you. PUSH BUTTON says 'How?' DOWN to ceiling (room 24). Stop fan via penthouse thermostat.

needs: Large fan in my way (must be in room)

notes: Air duct with *Gem* and blocking fan. AT BUTTON is fatal. Stop fan via penthouse thermostat. DOWN to ceiling (room 24).
